meaning: n.[蛹ｻ](荳ｺ豬句ｮ夊是蜈ｻ迥ｶ蜀ｵ諡ｧ謐冗坩閧､閠悟ｽ｢謌千噪)逧ｮ閧､隍ｶ
examples: Online calculators (used in conjunction with skinfold or tape measurements).
Skinfold thickness and body composition of newborn infants are important indexes of evaluating the nutritional status of newborns.
The Harpenden Skinfold Caliper has been used all over the world on projects of international importance and is the most prestigious Caliper available.
